rulings.Case Title: JO ANN FARESE VS. CHASE HOME FINANCE LLC, et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 5, 2012. Line 6 - DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A., AS SUCCESSOR BY MERGER, CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY's DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT. Off calendar moving party has repeatedly failed to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6C and CCP 1010. Opposing party contrary to court admonition exceed page limit. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BISHOP DONALD PIPKINS, AN INDIVIDUAL et al VS. HOMEQ CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 5, 2012. Line 1 - DEFENDANT WMC MORTGAGE LLC's DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain without leave to amend. No opposition filed and collateral estoppel. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN VASEY VS. JEREMY T WHEAT et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 5, 2012. Line 2 - DEFENDANT JEREMY WHEAT's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Grant subject to opposition - rent over stated see 1999 Rent Board discussion and 2011-2012 rent increases. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AP SF SUTTER LLC VS. JILL T ABRAHAMS et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 5, 2012. Line 3 - DEFENDANT JILL ABRAHAMS' MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Deny fail to meet CCP 473 10 days between October 25 and November 5 not explained. Also rent not proffered within 3 days period no explanation. =(501/REQ)
